content: This tutorial aims to record the procedure of how to install TensorRT on Ubuntu 16.04. For more details, please refer to here. Note that the TensorRT relies on the corresponding cuda and cudnn library. Install them using the deb files by following the tutorial in here. Download the TensorRT files from here; Download TensorRT 7.0.0.11 for Ubuntu 16.04 and CUDA 10.2 deb package; os="ubuntu1604" tag="cuda10.2-trt7.0.0.11-ga-20191216" sudo dpkg -i nv-tensorrt-repo-${os}-${tag}_1-1_amd64.deb sudo apt-key add /var/nv-tensorrt-repo-${tag}/7fa2af80.pub sudo apt-get update sudo apt-get install tensorrt sudo apt-get install python-libnvinfer-dev # for python2 sudo apt-get install python3-libnvinfer-dev # for python3 sudo apt-get install uff-converter-tf # for tensorflow
title: TensorRT Installation
